instructions: For each source set decision to 'approve' or 'reject'. Note any edits to summary/quote/theme. Then the white paper + keynote regenerate from approved sources and the site rebuilds.

pending_sources.publisher: AI News (reporting Accenture Consumer Pulse Research)

major_changes_to_approve: Cycle 0's white paper v0.1 and keynote v0.1 outline are still pending their first approval (carried over).

Consider adding a 'persuasion & manipulation' sub-section to the white paper given rg-c1-04 (arXiv: Commercial Persuasion in AI-Mediated Conversations) — strong empirical evidence that conversational agents can steer purchases far more effectively, and less detectably, than traditional sponsored search.

Consider adding a short section on the Universal Commerce Protocol (Google, tc-c1-02) alongside the existing ACP coverage, since two competing open standards for agent-merchant communication are now live.

Consider noting in the keynote that UK CMA guidance (rg-c1-02) and the EU Product Liability Directive (rg-c1-03) are the first concrete regulatory frameworks explicitly extending existing consumer/liability law to agent-mediated purchases.
